title: Busan、BUS — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Busan、BUS的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Busan是BUS的一個城市，人口約3,453,000。Korea’s second-largest city and premier port, known for its stunning beaches, seafood markets, and the Busan International Film Festival.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
